home_hero.label: My name is
home_hero.title: DASH
home_hero.subtitle: Studio.
home_hero.body: Creative team with more than 5 years of combined experience across branding, web development, motion design, management systems, and game development.

servicesSection.label: What We Do
servicesSection.title: Five disciplines. One studio.
servicesSection.body: We connect strategy, design, code, motion, and product thinking into one focused workflow, so every part of the project feels built by the same team.
descriptions: Identity systems with a clear visual language across logo, color, type, and launch assets.
Responsive websites and web apps designed for trust, speed, and easy maintenance.
Motion pieces, launch videos, explainers, and interface animation that make ideas easier to feel.
Custom dashboards and internal tools shaped around how your team actually works.
Interactive experiences with strong mechanics, sharp interfaces, and production-ready structure.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: We're new. But we're not guessing.
experience.body: DASH may be just getting started, but our team brings years of hands-on experience. We've designed brands, shipped products, built systems for healthcare providers, and developed games.

cards.title: Clinics & Healthcare
cards.body: Systems that streamline operations and make running a clinic effortless.

cards.title: Startups Finding Their Voice
cards.body: From zero to brand identity — we help early-stage teams look like they mean business.

cards.title: Brands Ready for a Refresh
cards.body: We rethink, rebuild, and relaunch brands that deserve to be seen.

cards.title: Creators & World-Builders
cards.body: Games, interactive experiences, and immersive worlds — built with creativity and precision.

team.label: Our Team
team.title: 6 minds. One direction.
team.body: Designers, developers, storytellers, and builders. No egos. No filler. Just people who care deeply about the details.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's build something worth remembering.
contact.body: Have a project in mind? A system to build? A game to create? Or just want to see if we're the right fit — we'd love to hear from you.

form.name: Your Name
form.project: What are you looking to build?
form.projectPh: A brand, a website, a system...
form.messagePh: Give us a brief idea of your project, timeline, and goals...
form.successMsg: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
form.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.label: Our Services
hero.title:
Five disciplines.
One studio.
hero.body: Every service we offer is a craft we've mastered. No subcontractors, no guesswork — just precision and purpose from start to finish.

branding.title:
Branding &
Visual Identity
branding.tagline: Your brand is your first impression — make it count.
branding.body: We build complete brand identities from the ground up. Every color, typeface, and mark is crafted with intent — so your brand speaks before you say a word.
branding.visSub: Every mark. Every color. Every word.

web.title:
Web Design &
Development
web.tagline: Beautiful by design. Fast by default.
web.body: We design and build websites that earn trust. Every interface guides users naturally — clean code, responsive layouts, and zero compromise on performance.
web.visSub: Pixels with purpose. Code with care.

motion.title:
Motion &
Video Production
motion.body: Attention is the rarest resource. We craft motion content that earns it — brand films, reels, UI animations, and explainers that people actually finish watching.
motion.visSub: Frame by frame. Story by story.

systems.title:
Management
Systems
systems.tagline: Built around how your team actually works.
systems.body: Generic software slows you down. We build custom dashboards and internal tools that fit your exact workflow — so your team moves faster with less friction.

games.title:
Game
Development
games.tagline: Worlds built with creativity and precision.
games.body: From concept to launch, we handle every layer. Mechanics that hook, visuals that impress, and experiences that stay with the player long after they close the screen.

request.title: Start a project
request.intro: Send a short brief and we will reply with the next step.
request.name: Your Name
request.success: Request sent. We'll be in touch soon.
request.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
request.contactBody: Reach us through the channel that works best for you.

steps.title: We start by listening.
steps.body: Every project begins with understanding. We dig into your goals, audience, and context before drawing a single shape or writing a single line of code.

steps.title: We iterate until it's inevitable.
steps.body: We sketch, prototype, and refine until the solution feels right. No arbitrary choices — every decision is intentional, backed by craft and clear thinking.

steps.title: We ship. You grow.
steps.body: Clean handoffs, polished assets, and support that doesn't end at launch. We stay involved until you're confident — and beyond, if you need us.

worth remembering.
cta.body: Have a project in mind? Tell us about it. We respond within 24 hours — no templates, no runaround.

hero.label: Our Work
hero.title:
We let the work
do the talking.
hero.body: From brand identities to full-scale systems — every project here represents a problem solved, a story told, and a standard held.

stats.tagLbl: Every project, fully owned and delivered.

items.title: The Beginning
items.body: First freelance projects — logo design, small websites, and learning everything the hard way.

items.title: First Real Clients
items.body: Landed first recurring clients. Started to understand what clients actually need versus what they ask for.

items.title: Systems Work Begins
items.body: Built first clinic management system. Discovered the power of solving operational problems through software.

items.title: Motion & Game Dev
items.body: Expanded into motion design and game development. The team grew — each person bringing a new discipline.

items.title: DASH Studio Forms
items.body: Decided to stop freelancing solo and build something real. DASH Studio was born from a simple belief: quality over volume.

items.title: Now — Building Forward
items.body: 12+ projects in. 5 disciplines. One studio. We're just getting started.

skills.label: Disciplines
skills.title: Five crafts. One team.
skills.body: Each person on our team owns their discipline completely — no generalists, no shortcuts.

testimonials.label: What Clients Say
testimonials.title: Words from the people we've worked with.

items.quote: DASH didn't just design our clinic system — they thought through every workflow we had. The result actually changed how we operate day to day.
items.name: Ahmad K.

items.quote: We came to them with a vague idea and left with a brand identity that felt exactly like us. Fast, sharp, and professional from day one.
items.name: Sara M.

items.quote: The motion content they made for our launch campaign stopped people mid-scroll. We saw engagement go up immediately after the videos dropped.
items.name: Rami H.

cta.label: Work with us
cta.title: Experience you can see in the work.
cta.body: Every project we take on gets our full attention. Not a template. Not a shortcut. Real craft, real results.
